title: Cosmos Portals
description: Create Portals to anywhere, from anywhere!
body:
![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba09baf71b4d059e734f68481c3b410527d88758.png)

# **Cosmos Portals**

### **Notices**

Cosmos Portals is now available for **1.21.1** and **NeoForge**.

*As of 1.21.1 version 8.11.0.0 Cosmos Portals has moved away from native 32x textures, in favor of 16x textures to integrate into the look and feel of Minecraft better. For those who prefer 32x textures or run other 32x Resource Packs, the original textures are available in the form of a separate Resource Pack.*

### **Description**

Cosmos Portals is a simple mod that allows you to create Portals to any Dimension, so long as you can visit that Dimension first. You can even use it to travel between places in the **same** Dimension! No more messy Nether Portals, or having to cover long distances to your End Portal, travel _exactly_ where you want!

### **New Features**:
- **Customization**: Choose your own name & colour for your Dimension Containers.
- **Upgraded Portal Dock [4]**: A Portal Dock that can store 4 different Dimension Containers with the ability to hot swap them either using the GUI or the Dock Controller Block.
- **Upgraded Portal Dock [8]**: Same as the above but with 8 slots for Dimension Containers.
- **Dock Controller**: A block which can be linked to a Portal Dock and switch between stored Containers with a simple button press.
- **Portal Filtering**: Filter portals for specific entities, allowing player-only portals, mob-only portals or even item-only portals!

### **32x Resource Pack**

Check out the original 32x textures [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cosmos-portals-32x).

### **Dependencies**

Cosmos Portals requires **Cosmos Library** in order to function, please download the latest version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmos-library).

## **The Cosmos Series**

This mod is part of **[The Cosmos Series](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-cosmos-series)**.
